subject: Away from my desk Re: Exploring a Reliable Manufacturing Partner for With Nothing Underneath
body_preview:
Hi, I am out of the office with limited access to my email. I will respond
to your email upon my return on Monday 13th April. For any urgent queries, please reach out to dipen@withnothingunderneath.com. Thank you
Laura -- Laura Hilton COO Email: laura@withnothingunderneath.com Web: www.withnothingunderneath.co <http://www.withnothingunderneath.com/>m Office: WNU, Unit 5G Hewlett House, Palmerston Way, London, SW8 4AS Deliveries: WNU Unit 5G, Hewlett House, 5 Havelock terrace SW8 4AS

subject: Out Of Office Re: Exploring manufacturing partnership for Linzi's collections
body_preview:
Hi,

Thank you for your email.

I am currently on maternity leave, so I won’t be fully available
day-to-day. However, I will still be checking emails occasionally and
will do my best to pass your message on to the relevant member of my
team where needed.

If your enquiry is urgent, please include “URGENT” in the subject line
so I can ensure it reaches the right person as quickly as possible.

Alternatively please email mike@linzi.com

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regar

subject: Re: Exploring manufacturing partnership for Wear London's collections
body_preview: Thank you for your email. We manufacture all of our products in the UK. Regards Jim 07850 365778
